requirement_topic.en: EMC — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-Series Evidence for PV Inverters in Liberia
requirement_topic.zh: EMC——利比里亚光伏逆变器IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC——賴比瑞亞光伏逆變器IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列證據

summary.en: A Liberia-specific public EMC technical regulation for solar PV inverters has not been identified. For market acceptance, utility interconnection, donor procurement, and conformity assessment, the practical technical baseline is IEC 62920 for photovoltaic power-conversion equipment EMC, supported by applicable IEC 61000-series immunity and emissions tests. Liberia's standards authority context should be confirmed with LiSA/NSL, and grid-tied projects should confirm any LERC, LEC, or licensed-operator harmonic, flicker, immunity, and power-quality limits. Because Liberia commonly uses 60 Hz supply, EMC and harmonic evidence prepared only under China 50 Hz operating assumptions should be checked for applicability to the supplied firmware, voltage, cabling, earthing, and site conditions.
summary.zh: 尚未发现利比里亚公开的、专门针对太阳能光伏逆变器的EMC技术法规。就市场接受、公用事业接入、捐助方采购和合格评定而言，实际技术基准为适用于光伏功率变换设备EMC的IEC 62920，并辅以适用的IEC 61000系列抗扰度和发射测试。利比里亚标准机构背景应向LiSA/NSL确认，并网项目还应确认LERC、LEC或持牌运营方是否规定谐波、闪变、抗扰度和电能质量限值。由于利比里亚通常采用60 Hz供电，仅按中国50 Hz运行假设编制的EMC和谐波证据应检查其对所供应固件、电压、布线、接地和现场条件的适用性。
summary.zht: 尚未發現賴比瑞亞公開的、專門針對太陽能光伏逆變器的EMC技術法規。就市場接受、公用事業接入、捐助方採購和合格評定而言，實際技術基準為適用於光伏功率轉換設備EMC的IEC 62920，並輔以適用的IEC 61000系列抗擾度和發射測試。賴比瑞亞標準機構背景應向LiSA/NSL確認，併網項目還應確認LERC、LEC或持牌運營方是否規定諧波、閃變、抗擾度和電能品質限值。由於賴比瑞亞通常採用60 Hz供電，僅按中國50 Hz運行假設編制的EMC和諧波證據應檢查其對所供應韌體、電壓、佈線、接地和現場條件的適用性。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility test methods, immunity, emissions, harmonic, and flicker limits as applicable
Liberia Standards Authority (LiSA) conformity-assessment and standards-adoption context — confirm current scope before import
LERC / LEC / licensed-operator power-quality requirements — confirm project-specific harmonic and disturbance limits

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter EMC evidence is commonly included under GB/T 37408 and related domestic tests at CNAS-accredited laboratories. The reports can reference IEC 61000-family methods, but the scope, operating voltage, 50 Hz test configuration, limits, and acceptance route are not automatically the same as IEC 62920 evidence requested by Liberia project owners or conformity bodies. A Chinese EMC certificate should therefore be mapped clause-by-clause against IEC 62920 and any LEC or donor power-quality requirement.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC证据通常包含在GB/T 37408及相关国内测试中，并由中国CNAS认可实验室出具。报告可能引用IEC 61000系列方法，但测试范围、运行电压、50 Hz测试配置、限值和接受路径并不自动等同于利比里亚项目业主或合格评定机构要求的IEC 62920证据。因此，中国EMC证书应逐条映射至IEC 62920以及任何LEC或捐助方电能质量要求。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC證據通常包含在GB/T 37408及相關國內測試中，並由中國CNAS認可實驗室出具。報告可能引用IEC 61000系列方法，但測試範圍、運行電壓、50 Hz測試配置、限值和接受路徑並不自動等同於賴比瑞亞項目業主或合格評定機構要求的IEC 62920證據。因此，中國EMC證書應逐條映射至IEC 62920以及任何LEC或捐助方電能品質要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters) — includes domestic EMC expectations
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China GB/T EMC test evidence does not by itself prove IEC 62920 compliance for Liberia. Exporters should obtain an IEC 62920 test report or a detailed equivalence matrix from an ILAC-recognised laboratory; verify harmonic and flicker limits required by LEC or the licensed operator; confirm 60 Hz operating mode, cable lengths, earthing, surge protection, and enclosure configuration; and include high-humidity tropical installation assumptions. Where a donor, lender, or mini-grid operator specifies VeraSol, IEC TS 62257, or additional power-quality criteria, those criteria should be added to the EMC evidence package.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T EMC测试证据本身不能证明符合利比里亚所需的IEC 62920。出口商应取得来自ILAC认可实验室的IEC 62920测试报告或详细等效矩阵；核实LEC或持牌运营方要求的谐波和闪变限值；确认60 Hz运行模式、电缆长度、接地、浪涌保护和外壳配置；并纳入高湿热带安装假设。若捐助方、贷款方或微电网运营方规定VeraSol、IEC TS 62257或额外电能质量标准，应将这些标准加入EMC证据包。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T EMC測試證據本身不能證明符合賴比瑞亞所需的IEC 62920。出口商應取得來自ILAC認可實驗室的IEC 62920測試報告或詳細等效矩陣；核實LEC或持牌運營方要求的諧波和閃變限值；確認60 Hz運行模式、電纜長度、接地、浪湧保護和外殼配置；並納入高濕熱帶安裝假設。若捐助方、貸款方或微電網運營方規定VeraSol、IEC TS 62257或額外電能品質標準，應將這些標準加入EMC證據包。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where specified by LiSA/NSL conformity assessment, LERC or LEC technical review, licensed-operator interconnection rules, donor procurement, lender due diligence, or project-owner specifications; otherwise best-practice technical evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary — China GB/T EMC evidence supports domestic certification but is not an automatic Liberia IEC 62920 acceptance route

source.publisher: Liberia Ministry of Commerce & Industry / Liberia Standards Authority (LiSA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Chinese EMC reports as background unless they are mapped to IEC 62920 and the Liberia project's 60 Hz operating profile. Confirm LiSA/NSL conformity expectations, LERC or LEC power-quality requirements, and donor or mini-grid procurement criteria before accepting GB/T 37408 EMC evidence for Liberia.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 除非中国EMC报告已映射至IEC 62920和利比里亚项目的60 Hz运行配置，否则应仅作为背景资料。接受GB/T 37408 EMC证据用于利比里亚前，请确认LiSA/NSL合格评定预期、LERC或LEC电能质量要求以及捐助方或微电网采购标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 除非中國EMC報告已映射至IEC 62920和賴比瑞亞項目的60 Hz運行配置，否則應僅作為背景資料。接受GB/T 37408 EMC證據用於賴比瑞亞前，請確認LiSA/NSL合格評定預期、LERC或LEC電能品質要求以及捐助方或微電網採購標準。
